name: Lady Xiahou
page_title: Lady Xiahou 夏侯氏 [Wei, Shu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
novel_notes:
Xiahou Shi, Zhang Fei’s wife, appeared as a secret character in Koei’s Romance of the Three Kingdoms XI.

“Xiahou Yuan’s niece. Xiahou Ba’s cousin. Zhang Fei’s wife. The mother of Zhang Shi, Liu Shan’s Empress. In the year 200, when Xiahou Shi was thirteen or fourteen, she was captured by Zhang Fei when out collecting firewood, and became his wife. In 219, when Xiahou Yuan died in battle, Xiahou Shi asked to bury the reamins, Xiahou Ba (who later defected to Shu) was given preferential treatment because he was Xiahou Shi’s cousin, and was promoted to Marshal.” (1)

1: Source: Romance of the Three Kingdoms XI

full_text:
Lady Xiahou 夏侯氏
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lady Xiahou (夏侯氏)was born in Pei commandery. Wife to Zhang Fei. Xiahou Yuan’s niece and Xiahou Ba’s cousin. Lady Xiahou was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom and the Shu Kingdom. Lady Xiahou lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
